creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Tue May 13 15:20:03 2014
New Revision: 353963
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353963
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353963/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Convert to new options framework
  - Support STAGEDIR
  - While I'm here, simplify Makefile
  
  PR:		ports/189663
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/mail/spamguard/Makefile

Modified: head/mail/spamguard/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/spamguard/Makefile	Tue May 13 15:04:48 2014	(r353962)
+++ head/mail/spamguard/Makefile	Tue May 13 15:20:03 2014	(r353963)
@@ -9,12 +9,15 @@ MASTER_SITES=	http://www.enderunix.org/s
 MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	MTA spam prevention program for qmail/postfix/sendmail
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	automake:${PORTSDIR}/devel/automake
+LICENSE=	BSD3CLAUSE
+
+USE_AUTOTOOLS=	automake
 
-PKGMESSAGE=	${WRKDIR}/pkg-message
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+
 DOCS=		AUTHORS CHANGELOG COPYING INSTALL \
 		POST-INSTALL README THANKS README.DigitalUnix \
 	        THANKS TODO UPGRADE
@@ -23,17 +26,12 @@ DOCS_TR=	BENIOKU BENIOKU.DigitalUnix COP
 
 SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 pre-configure:
-	        cd ${WRKSRC}; \
-		./autogen.sh
+	cd ${WRKSRC}; ./autogen.sh
 
 post-install:
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}/tr
-	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_DATA} ${DOCS} ${DOCSDIR}
-	cd ${WRKSRC}/tr && ${INSTALL_DATA} ${DOCS_TR} ${DOCSDIR}/tr
-.endif
-	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}/tr
+	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_DATA} ${DOCS} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	cd ${WRKSRC}/tr && ${INSTALL_DATA} ${DOCS_TR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}/tr
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
_______________________________________________
